steps.title: Locate the clue about the historical norm
steps.content: The critical clue is “highly decorated and detailed sets were not common until the 1600s.” This establishes that in the distant past, simple stages were the standard practice.

steps.title: Determine what audiences would experience as standard
steps.content: When something is standard practice, audiences expect it—this is what “expected by” directly conveys. The others—disliked, confusing, exciting—all suggest unwanted qualities or novelty that contradict the passage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
